name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x: 56 creature sprites, 11 script events (encounter/battle/party/capture/heal/items), 6 backgrounds (battle/lab/forest/route1/town/party/bag), overworld tileset, 5 sound FX. Drop in plugins/ and reload.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
